author: r膩dh膩mohana d膩sa
verses:
vande vi艣vambhara鈰卲ada鈰卥amalam
kha峁囜笉ita鈰卥aliyuga鈰卝anamala鈰卻amalam

saurabha鈰卥ar峁ta鈰卬ijajana鈰卪adhupam
karu峁嚹佲媴kha峁囜笉ita鈰卾iraha鈰卾it膩pam

n膩艣ita鈰卙峁沝gata鈰卪膩y膩鈰卼imiram
vara鈰卬ijak膩nty膩鈰卝agat膩maciram

satata鈰卾ir膩jita鈰卬irupama鈰吪沷bham
r膩dh膩mohana鈰卥alita鈰卾ilobham
en_translation:
I worship the lotus feet of Vi艣vambhara. He destroys all the impurities of the people of this age.

He attracts His devotees鈥攚ho are like bees鈥攚ith His fragrance. His mercy alleviates the distress of separation.

He destroys the darkness of illusion situated in the heart. By His own supreme effulgence, He quickly illuminates the world.

He is always resplendent with incomparable beauty. He is the charming Lord who enchants R膩dh膩.
